auth.label: Personal Access Token
auth.description: Censys Personal Access Token sent with the Authorization Bearer header. Create or view tokens in the Censys Platform account settings: https://platform.censys.io.

actions.name: get_certificate
actions.description: Get one Censys Global Data certificate asset by certificate ID.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Censys certificate asset.

certificate.description: Raw certificate asset returned by Censys.

actions.name: get_host
actions.description: Get one Censys Global Data host asset by host ID.

at_time.description: RFC 3339 timestamp for retrieving a historical host view.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Censys host asset.

host.description: Raw host asset returned by Censys.

actions.name: get_web_property
actions.description: Get one Censys Global Data web property asset by web property ID.

webproperty_id.description: Censys web property ID in hostname:port format, such as platform.censys.io:443.

at_time.description: RFC 3339 timestamp for retrieving a historical web property view.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Censys web property asset.

webProperty.description: Raw web property asset returned by Censys.

outputSchema.description: Normalized Censys web property asset details.
